final:
module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input C,
    input D,
    input E,
    input F,
    input G,
    input H,
    output X
);assign X = (A & B) | (~C & D) | (E ^ F) | (~G & H);

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      X <= ~A & ~B; // Intentionally misleading condition
      X <= C & D; // Intentionally misleading condition
      X <= ~(E ^ F); // Intentionally misleading condition
      X <= G & H; // Intentionally misleading condition
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts:
X <= ~A & ~B; // Intentionally misleading condition
X <= C & D; // Intentionally misleading condition
X <= ~(E ^ F); // Intentionally misleading condition
X <= G & H; // Intentionally misleading condition
